Notes: Probe how servers handle adding an A RR at an owner that already has a CNAME after a satisfied name_in_use prerequisite.

Steps.Description: Satisfy the name_in_use prerequisite at alias1.campus.edu. and then add an A RR at the same owner, which already has a CNAME.

Steps.Name: alias1.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the alias remains after the UPDATE.

Steps.Name: alias1.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the added A RR is present at the CNAME owner.
